title: Tomb of the Sunken King
blurb: Descend into a flooded, cursed crypt for the crown of Khaluun — past his still-walking court.

antechamber.location: Tomb of the Sunken King — The Antechamber
antechamber.scene: Cold flagstones slope down into the dark, slick with centuries of seepage. Khaluun, the Sunken King, was entombed here with his crown — and a curse that keeps his court walking. Across the chamber, a great pair of doors bears the carved sockets of the royal sigil, split long ago into two halves: one rests here in a niche above a row of pitted firing-slits, the other was borne off deeper into the tomb. Press the sigil whole into the doors and the royal vault will open. A carved descent leads down into the Gallery of Kings.

the sigil-sealed doors of the royal vaul.denied: The sockets in the vault doors gape empty. Until both halves of the royal sigil are pressed home as one, the stone will not give an inch.

gallery_of_kings.location: Tomb of the Sunken King — The Gallery of Kings
gallery_of_kings.scene: A long hall lined with the standing sarcophagi of dead monarchs, their stone faces watching. Two of the king's honor guard stand among them, dry bone gone grey with age, swords still in their fists — roused, but not yet turned your way. Tripwires of corroded bronze glint across the floor at ankle height. A flooded stair sinks away toward a reliquary at the gallery's end, and the carved descent climbs back to the antechamber. Disturb the tombs and the whole court may wake.

flooded_reliquary.location: Tomb of the Sunken King — The Flooded Reliquary
flooded_reliquary.scene: Black water churns waist-deep through a vaulted reliquary, a cold undertow dragging at every step. A ghoul crouches on a half-sunk bier, gnawing at something pale, and turns its dead eyes on you. Beyond it, mounted on a drowned altar, sit the second half of the royal sigil and a Pearl of Power sealed in a wax-stopped reliquary jar. The only ways out are the flooded stair back up to the gallery.

sealed_vault.location: Tomb of the Sunken King — The Royal Vault
sealed_vault.scene: The sigil-doors grind apart onto a domed vault hung with rotted funeral silks. On a black basalt throne sits Khaluun, the Sunken King himself — a mummified monarch crowned in tarnished gold, rising now with a dry hiss of bandage and old fury. The Drowned Crown gleams on his brow. There is no door behind you that matters now; the curse ends here, or you join his court.
